spec.description: Health and throughput monitoring for the OpenTelemetry Collector — receivers, exporters, queue pressure, and process resources.
Total telemetry items accepted by all receivers (spans + metrics + logs + profiles/s)
spec.title: Data Received

spec.description: Total telemetry items exported successfully by all exporters/s
spec.title: Data Sent

spec.description: Rate of telemetry items refused by receivers or failed during export
spec.title: Refused / Failed

spec.description: Highest queue utilization across all exporters (0-100%)
spec.title: Max Queue Fill

spec.expr:
sum by (receiver, data_type) (
  rate(otelcol_receiver_accepted_metric_points_total[$__rate_interval]) or
  rate(otelcol_receiver_accepted_log_records_total[$__rate_interval]) or
  rate(otelcol_receiver_accepted_spans_total[$__rate_interval]) or
  rate(otelcol_receiver_accepted_profiles_total[$__rate_interval])
)

spec.description: Per-receiver and data type telemetry accepted rate
spec.title: Receiver — Accepted Throughput

spec.expr:
sum by (receiver, data_type) (
  rate(otelcol_receiver_refused_metric_points_total[$__rate_interval]) or
  rate(otelcol_receiver_refused_log_records_total[$__rate_interval]) or
  rate(otelcol_receiver_refused_spans_total[$__rate_interval]) or
  rate(otelcol_receiver_refused_profiles_total[$__rate_interval])
)

sum by (exporter, data_type) (
  rate(otelcol_exporter_sent_metric_points_total[$__rate_interval]) or
  rate(otelcol_exporter_sent_log_records_total[$__rate_interval]) or
  rate(otelcol_exporter_sent_spans_total[$__rate_interval]) or
  rate(otelcol_exporter_sent_profiles_total[$__rate_interval])
)

spec.description: Per-exporter and data type export rate
spec.title: Exporter — Sent Throughput

spec.expr:
sum by (exporter, data_type) (
  rate(otelcol_exporter_send_failed_metric_points_total[$__rate_interval]) or
  rate(otelcol_exporter_send_failed_log_records_total[$__rate_interval]) or
  rate(otelcol_exporter_send_failed_spans_total[$__rate_interval]) or
  rate(otelcol_exporter_send_failed_profiles_total[$__rate_interval])
)

spec.description: Items that could not be exported — indicates downstream issues or queue overflow
spec.title: Exporter — Send Failures

spec.expr: sum by (exporter, data_type) (otelcol_exporter_queue_size) / sum by (exporter, data_type) (otelcol_exporter_queue_capacity)

spec.description: Queue utilization per exporter — approaching 100% means the exporter can't keep up
spec.title: Exporter — Queue Utilization

spec.description: CPU core utilization of the OTel Collector process
spec.title: Process — CPU Usage

spec.description: Resident set size (physical memory) used by the OTel Collector process
spec.title: Process — Memory

spec.description: Live collector log output — watch for WARN/ERROR level entries
spec.title: Collector Logs
OpenTelemetry Collector
